sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ الْخَمْسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Namaz je drugi od pet stubova islama.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second of the five pillars of Islam.

sentences.arabic: ذَكَرَ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ أَنَّ الصَّلَاةَ تَنْهَى عَنِ الْفَحْشَاءِ وَالْمُنْكَرِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Utejmin je spomenuo da namaz odvraća od razvrata i zla.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen mentioned that prayer restrains one from shameful and evil deeds.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ صِلَةٌ دَائِمَةٌ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَخَالِقِهِ فِي كُلِّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: To je stalna veza između roba i njegovog Stvoritelja svakog dana.
sentences.translationEn: It is a permanent connection between the servant and his Creator every day.

sentences.arabic: يُحَافِظُ الْمُسْلِمُ عَلَى صَلَاتِهِ لِيَجِدَ الرَّاحَةَ فِي قَلْبِهِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman čuva svoj namaz kako bi pronašao smiraj u svom srcu.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim maintains his prayer to find peace in his heart.

sentences.arabic: تَرْكُ الصَّلَاةِ أَمْرٌ خَطِيرٌ جِدًّا فِي الشَّرِيعَةِ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ostavljanje namaza je veoma opasna stvar u islamskom zakonu.
sentences.translationEn: Neglecting prayer is a very serious matter in Islamic law.
